scripts.setup:venv: python -m venv venv && python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev:backend: sh -c 'PY=python; [ -x ./venv/bin/python ] && PY=./venv/bin/python; export ENABLE_MCP_IN_DEV=false; export UVICORN_RELOAD=true; exec "$PY" -m uvicorn api.main:app --reload --reload-exclude "agent_sandbox/*" --reload-exclude "logs/*" --reload-exclude "chroma_db/*" --reload-exclude "data/chroma/*" --reload-exclude "*.db" --reload-exclude "*.sqlite*" --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000'
scripts.dev:nova: npm run dev:services && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:nova"
scripts.dev:consumer: npm run dev:services && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:consumer"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run setup:venv && cd frontend_nova && npm install && cd ../frontend_consumer && npm install
scripts.install:nova: npm install && npm run setup:venv && cd frontend_nova && npm install
scripts.install:consumer: npm install && npm run setup:venv && cd frontend_consumer && npm install
